heading: Multinational economic embargoes against governments in armed conflict with the United States
label: 1707 Multinational economic embargoes against governments in armed conflict with the United States
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2000, and not as part of the International Emergency Economic Powers Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Policy on the establishment of embargoes
children.label: a Policy on the establishment of embargoes

children.text: seek the establishment of a multinational economic embargo against such country; and
seek the seizure of its foreign financial assets.
the specific steps the United States has taken and will continue to take to establish a multinational economic embargo and to initiate financial asset seizure pursuant to subsection (a); and
any foreign sources of trade or revenue that directly or indirectly support the ability of the adversarial government to sustain a military conflict against the United States.
